result.sentence: In the game Genshin Impact, the dish "Fine Tea, Full Moon" is a limited-time event recipe that is tied to specific in-game events rather than being permanently available.

In Genshin Impact, by checking whether a relevant seasonal event in Liyue, often around the in-game Mid-Autumn Festival period, is active, a player can confirm that the dish "Fine Tea, Full Moon" is currently obtainable.
In Genshin Impact, by updating the game client to the latest version, a player can ensure that the relevant event for obtaining the dish "Fine Tea, Full Moon" can appear and function correctly.

In Genshin Impact, by verifying that the specific event "A Tea Party Beneath the Moon" or an equivalent event that features the dish "Fine Tea, Full Moon" is active, a player can determine whether they can start progressing toward obtaining the recipe.

In Genshin Impact, by joining the event questline where the player interacts with Liyue NPCs hosting a tea and food celebration, the player can begin participating in the content that leads to obtaining the recipe for "Fine Tea, Full Moon".

In Genshin Impact, by progressing through the event questline until the cooking challenge or recipe rewards are unlocked, a player can reach the point where the recipe for "Fine Tea, Full Moon" becomes available.
In Genshin Impact, by receiving the recipe for "Fine Tea, Full Moon" as a quest reward during the event, a player can obtain this recipe without using event shop currency.
In Genshin Impact, by purchasing the recipe for "Fine Tea, Full Moon" from the event shop, a player can obtain the recipe as long as it is listed there and they have sufficient event currency.

In Genshin Impact, by collecting event currency through completing daily event challenges, mini-games, or combat domains, a player can acquire the resources needed to buy the recipe for "Fine Tea, Full Moon" from the event shop.

In Genshin Impact, by opening the Inventory menu and navigating to the Precious Items tab, a player can access the location where the recipe item for "Fine Tea, Full Moon" is stored before it is learned.
In Genshin Impact, by selecting the "Fine Tea, Full Moon" recipe item in the Precious Items tab of the Inventory, a player can prepare to use the item to learn the recipe.
In Genshin Impact, by using the "Fine Tea, Full Moon" recipe item in the Precious Items tab, a player can permanently learn the cooking recipe for "Fine Tea, Full Moon".

In Genshin Impact, by obtaining Tea Leaves, an event-exclusive ingredient earned during the relevant event activities, a player can secure one of the required ingredients for cooking the dish "Fine Tea, Full Moon".
In Genshin Impact, by purchasing Sugar from General Goods Shops, a player can acquire one of the standard ingredients needed to cook the dish "Fine Tea, Full Moon".
In Genshin Impact, by collecting Lotus Heads near lakes and rivers in the Liyue region, a player can obtain another required ingredient for cooking the dish "Fine Tea, Full Moon".
In Genshin Impact, by purchasing Milk from General Goods Shops, a player can obtain an additional required ingredient for cooking the dish "Fine Tea, Full Moon".
In Genshin Impact, the exact ingredient requirements for the dish "Fine Tea, Full Moon" may change each time the associated event is re-run.
In Genshin Impact, by going to any cooking station, a player can access the cooking interface needed to prepare the dish "Fine Tea, Full Moon".
In Genshin Impact, by selecting the learned recipe "Fine Tea, Full Moon" from the cooking menu at a cooking station, a player can initiate the process of cooking this dish.
In Genshin Impact, by cooking the dish "Fine Tea, Full Moon" manually for the first time at a cooking station, a player can unlock the auto-cook option for this dish for future use.

In Genshin Impact, if the relevant event for "Fine Tea, Full Moon" has already ended, players cannot currently obtain the dish or its recipe until the developers re-run that event or add the dish to a permanent source.
In Minecraft, by punching trees to gather wood in a new world, you can obtain the basic resource needed to start crafting tools and workstations.
In Minecraft, by converting gathered wood logs into wooden planks, you can create a more versatile crafting material used in many recipes.
In Minecraft, by crafting a crafting table using wooden planks, you can unlock a larger crafting grid that allows more complex items to be made.
In Minecraft, by using the crafting table to make a wooden pickaxe, you can obtain a basic tool that allows you to mine stone and ores.
In Minecraft, by finding stone (cobblestone) through digging down or locating an exposed rock face, you can access material needed for stronger tools and a furnace.
In Minecraft, by mining at least 17 cobblestones, you can gather enough stone to craft a furnace, a stone pickaxe, and possibly additional stone tools.
In Minecraft, by continuing to mine or exploring caves to find iron ore, you can locate the raw material required to make iron tools and a bucket.
In Minecraft, by collecting at least 3 iron ores, you can secure enough ore to smelt into iron ingots for crafting a bucket.
In Minecraft, by using cobblestone to craft a furnace, you can create a block that allows you to smelt ores and cook items.
In Minecraft, by smelting collected iron ore in a furnace using wood planks, charcoal, or coal as fuel, you can obtain iron ingots from the ore.
In Minecraft, by ensuring you obtain at least 3 iron ingots, you can guarantee that you have enough metal to craft one bucket.
In Minecraft, by using 3 iron ingots to craft a bucket, you can obtain a tool that allows you to carry liquids such as water and lava.
In Minecraft, by finding a water source in the world, you can identify a location from which to collect water with your bucket.
In Minecraft, by filling your bucket with water from a water source, you can carry water to other locations for obsidian creation or other uses.
In Minecraft, by locating a pool of lava, preferably a surface lava pool with multiple lava source blocks, you can find a suitable place to create obsidian for a Nether Portal.
In Minecraft, by pouring water from a bucket over a lava source block, you can transform that lava source block into an obsidian block.
In Minecraft, creating obsidian by cooling lava with water only works when the lava is a source block and not flowing lava.
In Minecraft, mining an obsidian block normally requires the use of a diamond pickaxe.
In Minecraft, there exists an alternative method to build a Nether Portal by forming obsidian in place, which does not require mining obsidian blocks.
In Minecraft, by planning to use 10 obsidian blocks and omitting the corners, you can design the smallest functional Nether Portal frame.
In Minecraft, the smallest functional Nether Portal frame is four blocks tall and five blocks wide, and its four corner blocks can be omitted without affecting activation.
In Minecraft, by creating a mold for the Nether Portal frame using dirt or other blocks, you can guide where lava and water will form obsidian blocks in the correct shape.
In Minecraft, by using a bucket to place lava into the mold at the desired portal frame positions, you can prepare those positions to be converted into obsidian.
In Minecraft, by pouring water over the placed lava in the mold, you can convert the lava into obsidian blocks that match the intended Nether Portal frame shape.
In Minecraft, by repeating the process of placing lava and pouring water in the mold, you can gradually complete the full obsidian frame of the Nether Portal without mining obsidian.
In Minecraft, by mining gravel blocks until you obtain at least one piece of flint, you can acquire the flint needed to craft flint and steel.
In Minecraft, by reserving or obtaining one iron ingot to use as steel, you can ensure you have the metal component required to craft flint and steel.
In Minecraft, by crafting flint and steel using one flint and one iron ingot, you can create an item that ignites blocks and activates Nether Portals.
In Minecraft, by using flint and steel to ignite one of the bottom obsidian blocks of the Nether Portal frame, you can activate the portal and create the purple portal field.
In Minecraft, if a player prefers to mine obsidian directly instead of forming it in place, that player must first obtain a diamond pickaxe.
In Minecraft, diamonds used to craft a diamond pickaxe are usually found deep underground near lava pools between Y-levels 5 and 16.
In Minecraft, by standing inside an activated Nether Portal for a few seconds, you can trigger the teleportation process to another dimension.
In Minecraft, after a player stands in an activated Nether Portal for a few seconds, the player is transported from the Overworld to the Nether dimension.
In Monster Hunter Generations, the Sharpness +1 skill increases the sharpness level of a weapon, allowing the weapon to deal more damage and bounce less often.

In Monster Hunter Generations, a player can activate the Sharpness +1 skill by equipping armor and decorations that provide the Handicraft skill, which grants the necessary skill points toward Sharpness +1.

In Monster Hunter Generations, by looking for armor sets that provide Handicraft points, such as the Nargacuga armor set and the Seregios armor set, a player can obtain a foundation of Handicraft points needed for Sharpness +1.

In Monster Hunter Generations, the Nargacuga armor set is primarily known for its evasion skills but can be combined with other armor pieces to contribute Handicraft points toward activating Sharpness +1.
In Monster Hunter Generations, the Silver Sol armor set provides Handicraft points and is a good option for players who have unlocked the Silver Sol armor set and are aiming for Sharpness +1.
In Monster Hunter Generations, by mixing pieces from different armor sets, a player can assemble a mixed set that collectively provides enough Handicraft points to activate the Sharpness +1 skill.

In Monster Hunter Generations, by selecting individual armor pieces that grant Handicraft points and combining these pieces into a single armor set, a player can reach at least +10 Handicraft, which is required to activate Sharpness +1.
In Monster Hunter Generations, by using Decorations (Gems) that add Handicraft points on armor slots, a player can increase their total Handicraft value toward the +10 requirement for Sharpness +1.
In Monster Hunter Generations, by crafting Decorations (Gems) that add Handicraft points at the Smithy, a player can create additional sources of Handicraft to socket into their armor.
In Monster Hunter Generations, crafting Decorations (Gems) that provide Handicraft points at the Smithy requires materials that are obtained from hunting monsters.

In Monster Hunter Generations, by using an appropriate combination of armor pieces and Handicraft-boosting Decorations (Gems), a player can reach the +10 Handicraft threshold needed to activate the Sharpness +1 skill.

In Monster Hunter Generations, by equipping charms (talismans) that provide Handicraft points, a player can further raise their Handicraft total and more easily reach the amount required for Sharpness +1.
In Monster Hunter Generations, by navigating to the status screen, a player can check their current skill points, including the total Handicraft points they have accumulated.
In Monster Hunter Generations, by confirming on the status screen that the Handicraft skill has reached +10, a player can verify that the Sharpness +1 skill has been activated.

In Monster Hunter Generations, progressing through the game and unlocking higher-rank quests provides access to more armor options, which can make it easier for a player to assemble sets that achieve the Sharpness +1 skill.
In Monster Hunter Generations, by hunting different monsters, a player can gather the materials needed to craft the armor pieces and Decorations (Gems) required to obtain the Sharpness +1 skill.

In Monster Hunter Generations, working toward skills such as Sharpness +1 typically involves repeatedly hunting monsters to grind for materials and using those materials to upgrade and optimize equipment.

In Minecraft, by gathering Blaze Powder, Water Bottles, Nether Wart, Spider Eye, Fermented Spider Eye, Glowstone Dust, Dragon’s Breath, and a Brewing Stand, a player can obtain all the materials needed to brew Lingering Potions of Harming II.
In Minecraft, Fermented Spider Eye is crafted by combining 1 Sugar, 1 Brown Mushroom, and 1 Spider Eye in a crafting grid.
In Minecraft, by placing Blaze Powder into the Brewing Stand’s fuel slot, a player can fuel the Brewing Stand so that it can perform brewing operations.
In Minecraft, by placing Water Bottles into the bottom three slots of the Brewing Stand, a player prepares those Water Bottles to be transformed into potions through brewing.

In Minecraft, by placing Nether Wart into the top slot of the Brewing Stand while Water Bottles are in the bottom slots, a player initiates brewing that will convert the Water Bottles into Awkward Potions.
In Minecraft, by waiting until the brewing process with Nether Wart completes, a player allows the Water Bottles in the Brewing Stand to become Awkward Potions.
In Minecraft, placing a Spider Eye in the top slot of the Brewing Stand over Awkward Potions brews Potions of Poison as an optional intermediate step.
In Minecraft, a player can skip the step of brewing Potions of Poison with a Spider Eye if the player intends to create Potions of Harming directly using a Fermented Spider Eye.

In Minecraft, by putting a Fermented Spider Eye into the top slot of the Brewing Stand over Awkward Potions, a player starts a brewing process that will produce Potions of Harming (Instant Damage I) or convert certain existing potions into Potions of Harming.

In Minecraft, putting a Fermented Spider Eye into the top slot of the Brewing Stand over Awkward Potions brews Potions of Harming (Instant Damage I) directly, and doing the same over compatible potions such as Potions of Healing or Potions of Poison converts them into Potions of Harming.

In Minecraft, by placing Glowstone Dust in the top slot of the Brewing Stand over Potions of Harming (Instant Damage I), a player initiates brewing that will upgrade those potions to Potions of Harming II (Instant Damage II).
In Minecraft, placing Glowstone Dust in the top slot of the Brewing Stand over Potions of Harming (Instant Damage I) upgrades the potions to Potions of Harming II (Instant Damage II).

In Minecraft, by placing Dragon’s Breath in the top slot of the Brewing Stand over Splash Potions of Harming II, a player initiates brewing that will convert those splash potions into Lingering Potions of Harming II.
In Minecraft, placing Dragon’s Breath in the top slot of the Brewing Stand over Splash Potions of Harming II converts those Splash Potions of Harming II into Lingering Potions of Harming II.

In Minecraft, if a player only has normal (non-splash) Potions of Harming II, the player must first add Gunpowder in the Brewing Stand to convert them into Splash Potions of Harming II before they can be turned into Lingering Potions of Harming II.
In Minecraft, by adding Gunpowder in the top slot of the Brewing Stand over normal Potions of Harming II, a player brews those normal potions into Splash Potions of Harming II.

In Minecraft, after converting normal Potions of Harming II into Splash Potions of Harming II with Gunpowder, a player can then add Dragon’s Breath in the Brewing Stand to brew Lingering Potions of Harming II.

In Minecraft, the complete brewing order for creating Lingering Potions of Harming II is: Water Bottle to Awkward Potion via Nether Wart, Awkward Potion to Potion of Harming I via Fermented Spider Eye, Potion of Harming I to Potion of Harming II via Glowstone Dust, Potion of Harming II to Splash Potion via Gunpowder, and Splash Potion to Lingering Potion via Dragon’s Breath.
In Terraria, by going to The Underworld (also called Hell), you can reach the location where you are able to summon the Wall of Flesh and progress toward Hardmode.
In Terraria, by using a Guide Voodoo Doll and throwing the Guide Voodoo Doll into lava while the Guide NPC is alive, you can summon the Wall of Flesh boss in The Underworld.
In Terraria, by defeating the Wall of Flesh boss, you can activate Hardmode in your world.
In Terraria Hardmode, by using a Pwnhammer dropped by the Wall of Flesh to smash at least one Demon Altar or Crimson Altar, you can begin spawning Hardmode ores in your world.
In Terraria, each Demon Altar or Crimson Altar that is broken causes new Hardmode ores to be generated in the world.
In Terraria, Titanium Ore only has a chance to appear in the world if the player breaks three or more Demon Altars or Crimson Altars.
In Terraria, the first tier of Hardmode ore generated in a world is either Cobalt or Palladium, depending on the world variant.
In Terraria, the second tier of Hardmode ore generated in a world is either Mythril or Orichalcum, depending on the world variant.
In Terraria, the third tier of Hardmode ore generated in a world is either Adamantite or Titanium, depending on the world variant.
In Terraria, Titanium Ore appears instead of Adamantite Ore in worlds that roll the Titanium variant for the third-tier Hardmode ore.
In Terraria, by going deep underground to the Cavern layer, you can reach the depth where Titanium Ore commonly generates.
In Terraria, by looking for shiny, silver-colored ore patches in the Cavern layer, you can visually identify deposits of Titanium Ore.
In Terraria, by using a Mythril Pickaxe, an Orichalcum Pickaxe, or a higher-tier pickaxe to mine Titanium Ore, you can successfully harvest Titanium Ore blocks.
In Terraria, by collecting Titanium Ore and taking the collected Titanium Ore to an Adamantite Forge or a Titanium Forge, you can prepare to smelt the ore into Titanium Bars.
In Terraria, an Adamantite Forge or Titanium Forge can be crafted by combining a Hellforge with 30 Adamantite Ore or 30 Titanium Ore at a Mythril Anvil or Orichalcum Anvil.
In Terraria, by smelting collected Titanium Ore at an Adamantite Forge or Titanium Forge, you can obtain Titanium Bars.
In Terraria, by going to a Mythril Anvil or Orichalcum Anvil, you can access the crafting recipes that allow you to use Titanium Bars to make Hardmode equipment such as the Titanium Sword.
In Terraria, by using 35 Titanium Bars at a Mythril Anvil or Orichalcum Anvil, you can craft the Titanium Sword, which is a Hardmode broadsword.
In the PC version of Terraria, the weapon known as the Titanium Sword is classified as a broadsword and is referred to in-game simply as Titanium Sword.
By opening the Microsoft Excel worksheet where you want to center text across multiple cells, you can begin the process of using the Center Across Selection feature.
By selecting the range of cells across which you want to center the text, such as selecting both cells A1 and B1, you define the area over which Microsoft Excel will center the text.
By right-clicking on the selected range of cells and choosing "Format Cells" from the context menu, you can open the Format Cells dialog in Microsoft Excel to adjust alignment settings.

By going to the "Home" tab on the ribbon in Microsoft Excel and clicking the small arrow in the bottom-right corner of the "Alignment" group, you can open the Format Cells dialog as an alternative method.
By clicking on the "Alignment" tab in the Format Cells dialog in Microsoft Excel, you can access the alignment options needed to center text across a selection.

By selecting "Center Across Selection" from the "Horizontal" dropdown menu on the Alignment tab in the Format Cells dialog, you configure Microsoft Excel to center the text horizontally across the selected cells.

By setting the "Vertical" dropdown on the Alignment tab in the Format Cells dialog to options such as "Bottom", "Center", or "Top", you control the vertical alignment of the text within the cells in Microsoft Excel.
By clicking "OK" in the Format Cells dialog in Microsoft Excel, you apply the chosen alignment settings so that the text is centered across the selected cells.

By verifying in the Microsoft Excel worksheet that the text in the first cell of the selected range appears centered across the entire selected range, you confirm that the Center Across Selection feature has been applied correctly.

In Microsoft Excel, using the "Center Across Selection" feature visually centers text across multiple cells without merging them, thereby preserving the ability to use each individual cell independently for data entry or calculations.
In BitLife, by aiming for 90% or higher Looks for your character from birth or later in life, you can create a character that is well-suited for a successful modeling career.
In BitLife, by improving your character’s Looks with plastic surgery, you can significantly increase their attractiveness for modeling jobs.
In BitLife, choosing low-quality or risky plastic surgeons early in your character’s life can make plastic surgery dangerous and lead to negative outcomes.
In BitLife, by improving your character’s Looks with salon visits, makeup, or hair changes, you can moderately boost their appearance for modeling opportunities.
In BitLife, by improving your character’s Looks with gym visits and healthy living choices, you can gradually enhance their attractiveness and support a modeling career.
In BitLife, by avoiding drugs, excessive alcohol, and risky choices, you can maintain your character’s Health, which supports long-term success as a model.
In BitLife, by graduating from high school before starting a professional modeling career, your character meets the basic education milestone while preparing to work as a model.
In BitLife, a college education is not required for a character to work as a professional model.
In BitLife, a character must be at least 18 years old to start professional modeling gigs.
In BitLife, by keeping your character’s Looks high during their teen years, you can position them to qualify for modeling jobs as soon as they turn 18.

In BitLife, by waiting until age 18, opening the Jobs menu, going to Special Careers, then Actor/Modeling, and applying for the Foot Model job, you can start your character’s entry-level modeling career.
In BitLife, by aging up your character and checking the Special Careers menu again when the Foot Model option does not appear, you can eventually trigger the availability of the Foot Model job.
In BitLife, by working hard at the Foot Model job, you can build your character’s experience and improve their performance for future modeling roles.
In BitLife, by posting on social media regularly with your character, you can grow their followers and maintain or increase their Fame as a model.
In BitLife, by accepting and doing photo shoots when they are offered to your model character, you can increase their Fame and modeling experience.
In BitLife, by accepting and doing commercials when they are offered to your model character, you can further increase their Fame and income.
In BitLife, by accepting and doing runway events when they are offered to your model character, you can raise their public exposure and modeling reputation.
In BitLife, by selecting activities that increase your model character’s public exposure, you can more effectively grow their Fame and unlock better modeling opportunities.
In BitLife, after your character gains some experience as a Foot Model, they can unlock more advanced roles such as Catalog Model or Runway Model.

In BitLife, by repeatedly applying for Catalog Model or Runway Model roles through Jobs → Special Careers → Model, you can eventually have your character promoted into higher-level modeling positions.
In BitLife, once your character becomes a Famous Model and the Fame bar is unlocked, they gain access to the Fame menu and additional fame-related actions.
In BitLife, by going to the Fame menu after becoming a Famous Model and hiring an agent, you can enable your character to receive elite modeling gig offers.
In BitLife, agents can provide a Famous Model character with elite gigs such as high-paying fashion campaigns and magazine covers.
In BitLife, elite modeling gigs typically require a character to have very high Looks, often around 95% or higher.
In BitLife, by accepting audition opportunities for luxury brands or runway shows when your agent offers them, you can give your character a chance to secure prestigious modeling jobs.
In BitLife, by always saying Yes to audition offers from your agent, even when you expect to fail, you maximize your character’s chances of landing high-profile modeling roles.
In BitLife, having both high Looks and high Fame increases a model character’s success rate at auditions.
In BitLife, by using the Work Harder option each year in your modeling job, you can improve your character’s performance and career progression.
In BitLife, by avoiding taking too many years off from modeling, you can prevent your character’s Fame and income from declining due to inactivity.
In BitLife, by continuing to boost your character’s Looks with surgery or cosmetic care when their Looks stat drops, you can maintain the high attractiveness needed for elite modeling gigs.
In BitLife, by filling your character’s Fame bar to the maximum level, you unlock the highest fame-related benefits and opportunities for your model.
In BitLife, by writing books once your character’s Fame is full, you can increase their income and create additional elite opportunities.
In BitLife, by appearing on TV talk shows once your character’s Fame is full, you can further boost their income and public profile.
In BitLife, by accepting sponsorship deals once your character’s Fame is full, you can significantly increase their income and attract more elite offers.
In BitLife, writing books, doing TV talk shows, and getting sponsorship deals not only boost a famous model’s income but also open additional elite career opportunities.
In BitLife, models can continue working for many years, but their Fame usually drops after retirement unless they transition into other fame-based careers such as acting or influencer work.
In BitLife, by saving money during your modeling career, you can ensure your character has financial security when they retire from modeling.

In BitLife, by branching into other celebrity roles such as acting or influencer careers after or near retirement from modeling, you can maintain your character’s Fame and continue earning high income.

By restarting the computer via Start, then Power, then Restart while holding the Shift key, a user can begin the process of entering the BIOS or UEFI environment needed to configure Secure Boot for Valorant’s Vanguard anti-cheat.

By navigating after restart to Troubleshoot, then Advanced options, then UEFI Firmware Settings, a user can enter the UEFI menu where Secure Boot settings can be changed for Valorant’s Vanguard anti-cheat.
By looking for a Boot tab or Security tab in the UEFI menu, a user can locate the section where Secure Boot settings are typically found for configuring Valorant’s Vanguard anti-cheat.

By finding the Secure Boot option within the Boot or Security tab in the UEFI menu, a user can access the specific setting that must be enabled for Valorant’s Vanguard anti-cheat to function properly.
Valorant’s Vanguard anti-cheat system requires the computer to use UEFI boot mode rather than Legacy or CSM boot mode in order to operate correctly.

By switching the Boot Mode setting from Legacy or CSM to UEFI in the UEFI firmware settings, a user can meet the UEFI boot mode requirement for Valorant’s Vanguard anti-cheat and prepare the system for enabling Secure Boot.
If a user switches a computer from Legacy boot mode to UEFI boot mode, the system drive must use the GPT partition style; otherwise, Windows will not boot successfully.
By setting the Secure Boot option to Enabled in the UEFI settings, a user can turn on Secure Boot, which is required for Valorant’s Vanguard anti-cheat to run without errors.
By choosing the Standard or Default option for Secure Boot Mode in the UEFI settings, a user can apply a compatible Secure Boot configuration that supports Valorant’s Vanguard anti-cheat.
By pressing F10 or selecting Save & Exit in the UEFI menu, a user can save the modified boot and Secure Boot settings so that they take effect on the next startup for Valorant’s Vanguard anti-cheat.

By confirming the changes in the UEFI menu and allowing the computer to reboot, a user can apply the new UEFI and Secure Boot configuration to the operating system environment used by Valorant’s Vanguard anti-cheat.
By pressing Windows Key + R in Windows, typing msinfo32, and pressing Enter, a user can open the System Information tool to check the Secure Boot status relevant to Valorant’s Vanguard anti-cheat.

By checking the Secure Boot State field in the System Information window in Windows and verifying that it says On, a user can confirm that Secure Boot is enabled for the system running Valorant’s Vanguard anti-cheat.
If the Secure Boot option is grayed out in the BIOS or UEFI settings, a user may need to set the OS Type setting to Windows UEFI Mode in BIOS or UEFI before Secure Boot can be enabled.
When switching a computer from Legacy boot mode to UEFI boot mode, a user might need to convert the system drive from MBR to GPT partition style before Windows will boot successfully.

The described Hollow Knight procedure provides an optimal order to defeat bosses from early-game to late-game so that the player can avoid unnecessary difficulty spikes and obtain upgrades before tackling harder fights.
The Hollow Knight boss order procedure explains one boss at a time, including where to find each boss, what upgrades are recommended, and key strategies for each fight.
The Hollow Knight boss order procedure progresses from the first easy encounters to the Pantheon bosses.

By fighting the False Knight in the Forgotten Crossroads when you have the basic Nail, base health, and possibly one Mask Shard, you can defeat a very early-game boss and progress your Hollow Knight playthrough.
The False Knight in the Forgotten Crossroads is designed as a very early-game Hollow Knight boss that teaches attack patterns without punishing player mistakes too severely.
By dodging the False Knight’s overhead slam in the Forgotten Crossroads by moving away from him, you can avoid taking damage during that attack in Hollow Knight.

By dashing under the False Knight in the Forgotten Crossroads when he jumps, once you have obtained the Mothwing Cloak dash ability, you can safely reposition and avoid his jump attack in Hollow Knight.
By hitting the False Knight in the Forgotten Crossroads during his stagger phase, you can deal significant damage safely and move the fight toward completion in Hollow Knight.
By fighting the Gruz Mother in the Forgotten Crossroads with the same gear recommended for the False Knight, you can defeat another early-game boss and open up nearby progression in Hollow Knight.
Defeating the Gruz Mother in the Forgotten Crossroads in Hollow Knight is a short fight that unlocks access to Sluglings and nearby charms.
By staying under the Gruz Mother’s belly in the Forgotten Crossroads, you can consistently deal damage to her during the fight in Hollow Knight.
By moving away from the Gruz Mother in the Forgotten Crossroads when she slams down, you can avoid taking damage from her slam attack in Hollow Knight.

By dealing with the small Gruzlings that appear after the Gruz Mother pops in the Forgotten Crossroads, you can safely finish the encounter and prevent being overwhelmed by additional enemies in Hollow Knight.
By fighting the Vengefly King in Greenpath with a basic Nail and four to five masks, you can overcome a minor early-game challenge and progress your Hollow Knight exploration.
Defeating the Vengefly King in Greenpath in Hollow Knight unlocks a route to the character Zote and provides a minor early-game challenge.
By staying under and slightly behind the Vengefly King in Greenpath, you can bait his dive attacks into predictable patterns that are easier to punish in Hollow Knight.
By performing a jump-slash on the Vengefly King in Greenpath when he dives, you can reliably hit him while avoiding his dive attack in Hollow Knight.
By fighting Hornet (Protector) in Greenpath when you have the Mothwing Cloak dash ability and four to five masks, you can defeat a key boss and progress the main story in Hollow Knight.
Defeating Hornet (Protector) in Greenpath in Hollow Knight grants the dash ability, which is required for further exploration and for tackling later bosses.
By dashing through Hornet (Protector)’s needle throws in Greenpath, you can avoid damage from her ranged attacks while maintaining offensive pressure in Hollow Knight.
By punishing Hornet (Protector) in Greenpath with attacks after she jumps over you, you can safely deal damage during one of her recovery windows in Hollow Knight.
By watching for Hornet (Protector)’s quick backstep before she lunges with her “GOTCHA!” move in Greenpath, you can anticipate this attack and prepare to dodge or counter it in Hollow Knight.

By fighting the Massive Moss Charger in the Greenpath side area when you have the dash ability, you can complete an easy encounter that yields Geo and practice with charge-based attacks in Hollow Knight.
Defeating the Massive Moss Charger in the Greenpath side area in Hollow Knight is considered very easy, grants additional Geo, and provides practice in dodging charge attacks.
By jumping over the Massive Moss Charger’s charges in the Greenpath side area, you can avoid taking damage from its primary attack in Hollow Knight.
By using down-slash attacks on the Massive Moss Charger in the Greenpath side area, you can land consistent hits while staying relatively safe above the enemy in Hollow Knight.

By fighting the Mantis Lords in the Mantis Village in the Fungal Wastes when you have dash, at least six masks, and possibly the Quick Focus or Thorns of Agony charms, you can defeat a major early-game boss encounter and open access to new areas in Hollow Knight.
Defeating the Mantis Lords in the Mantis Village in the Fungal Wastes in Hollow Knight unlocks entry to Deepnest and provides one of the best early fights for mastering pattern recognition.

By focusing on reading the single mantis’s jumps and throws during phase one of the Mantis Lords fight in the Mantis Village in the Fungal Wastes, you can learn the attack patterns and avoid damage in Hollow Knight.

By focusing on movement rather than greed during phase two of the Mantis Lords fight in the Mantis Village in the Fungal Wastes, when two mantises attack together, you can survive the onslaught and gradually deal safe damage in Hollow Knight.

The author of the Hollow Knight boss order guide offers to continue listing bosses in optimal order up to the final fight with The Radiance, including optional bosses and Dream Boss upgrades, and asks whether the reader wants all bosses including dream versions or only the main progression bosses.

In Bloons TD 6, by placing a Super Monkey tower and upgrading the Super Monkey to the Sun Avatar, you can obtain the Sun Avatar as the base for later Sun Temple upgrades.

In Bloons TD 6, by upgrading the Sun Avatar to the Sun Temple while sacrificing at least $50,000 worth of towers from each of the Primary, Military, and Magic categories, you can obtain a Sun Temple that has absorbed those tower categories.

In Bloons TD 6, by ensuring that you have a large amount of in-game money and enough open map space before attempting to create the True Sun God, you can avoid running out of resources or placement area during the required sacrifices.

In Bloons TD 6, by placing and upgrading the support towers that you intend to sacrifice to the Sun Temple, you can prepare sufficient value in support towers for later sacrifice toward the True Sun God.

In Bloons TD 6, by upgrading the Sun Temple to the True Sun God while having at least $50,000 worth of Primary, $50,000 worth of Military, and $50,000 worth of Magic category towers within the Sun Temple's range, you can transform the Sun Temple into a powerful True Sun God that incorporates those categories.

In Bloons TD 6, by sacrificing at least $50,000 worth of Support category towers to the Sun Temple during the upgrade to the True Sun God, you can grant the resulting True Sun God the Support Sun God buff.

In Bloons TD 6, by placing and fully upgrading a Monkey Knowledge–activated Legend of the Night (bottom path Super Monkey) somewhere on the map before upgrading the Sun Temple to the True Sun God, you can satisfy one of the prerequisites for creating the Vengeful True Sun God.

In Bloons TD 6, by placing and fully upgrading an Anti-Bloon (top path Super Monkey) somewhere on the map before upgrading the Sun Temple to the True Sun God, you can satisfy another prerequisite for creating the Vengeful True Sun God.

In Bloons TD 6, by upgrading the Sun Temple to the True Sun God with at least $50,000 worth of sacrifices in each of the Primary, Military, Magic, and Support categories while both the Legend of the Night and the Anti-Bloon remain on the map, you can trigger the conditions needed for the Vengeful True Sun God transformation.

In Bloons TD 6, if all sacrifice and tower-placement conditions are met, allowing the upgraded True Sun God to complete its transformation will result in the Vengeful True Sun God, which has a darker appearance and significantly enhanced powers compared to the regular True Sun God.

In Bloons TD 6, carefully planning the map layout so that there is enough room for all required towers and sacrifices helps ensure that the setup for the Vengeful True Sun God can be completed without running out of placement space.

In Bloons TD 6, the process of creating the Vengeful True Sun God is extremely expensive in terms of in-game cash, so having sufficient funds and managing money carefully during gameplay is necessary to complete the transformation.

In Minecraft, by exploring your world to locate a Mangrove Swamp biome, you can find the biome where mangrove trees naturally generate.
In Minecraft, the Mangrove Swamp biome is characterized by muddy terrain and is often found in warmer regions close to jungle biomes.
In Minecraft, by identifying trees with roots that stretch down into water or mud and canopies made of mangrove leaves, you can recognize mangrove trees in the Mangrove Swamp biome.
In Minecraft, mangrove trees have propagules hanging from their leaves, and these propagules can be used to grow new mangrove trees.
In Minecraft, by breaking the propagules that hang from the leaves of existing mangrove trees, you can collect mangrove propagules for planting.
In Minecraft, by allowing mangrove propagules to drop naturally from mangrove leaves and then picking them up, you can obtain mangrove propagules without manually breaking them.

In Minecraft, by choosing a planting location for mangrove propagules on suitable blocks such as dirt, grass blocks, coarse dirt, podzol, mud, clay, or sand, including underwater placements, you can ensure that the propagules can be planted successfully.

In Minecraft, by right-clicking (or using the equivalent interaction control on your platform) on a suitable block while holding a mangrove propagule, you can plant the propagule at that location so it can grow into a mangrove tree.
In Minecraft, by waiting after planting a mangrove propagule, you can allow it to grow naturally over time into a full mangrove tree.
In Minecraft, by using bone meal on a planted mangrove propagule, you can speed up its growth because each application of bone meal has a chance to advance the propagule’s growth stage.
In Minecraft, by harvesting a fully grown mangrove tree, you can obtain mangrove logs and additional mangrove propagules from its leaves as renewable resources.
In Minecraft, mangrove logs harvested from mangrove trees can be crafted into mangrove planks for building and crafting purposes.
In Minecraft, by gathering one iron ingot and three pieces of stone, you can obtain the necessary materials to craft a stonecutter.
In Minecraft, iron ingots can be obtained by smelting iron ore in a furnace.
In Minecraft, iron ingots can be obtained by looting chests in various generated structures.
In Minecraft, stone blocks are obtained by smelting cobblestone in a furnace.
In Minecraft, by ensuring that you have a crafting table placed in the world, you can use it to access the 3x3 crafting grid needed to craft a stonecutter.
In Minecraft, by right-clicking or pressing the use button on a placed crafting table, you can open the crafting table interface and access its 3x3 crafting grid.
In Minecraft, by placing one iron ingot in the center slot of the top row of the crafting table’s 3x3 grid, you set up part of the recipe required to craft a stonecutter.
In Minecraft, by placing three stone blocks in all three slots of the middle row of the crafting table’s 3x3 grid, you complete the material arrangement needed for the stonecutter recipe.

In Minecraft, by arranging one iron ingot in the top-center slot and three stone blocks across the middle row of the crafting table’s grid, you cause the stonecutter to appear as the output item in the crafting interface.
In Minecraft, by dragging the stonecutter from the crafting interface output slot into your inventory, you add the crafted stonecutter item to your inventory.
In Minecraft, by finding a suitable spot in the game world, you can choose an appropriate location to place your stonecutter for convenient use.
In Minecraft, by selecting the stonecutter in your inventory or hotbar, you prepare it as the active item for placement in the world.
In Minecraft, by right-clicking or pressing the use button on a desired block while the stonecutter is selected, you place the stonecutter in the world so it can be used.
In Minecraft, once a stonecutter has been placed in the world, it is ready to be used for stone-cutting operations.

In Minecraft, stonecutters allow players to craft stone-related blocks into specific shapes more efficiently and without wasting materials, making them particularly useful for stone building projects.
